$comment: Known-malicious EIP-7702 delegate (drainer) contracts. Adding an entry protects every user at once. Confirm each address independently before merging: a false positive tells a safe user to abandon a good wallet; a miss gives false comfort. Every entry cites the evidence that confirmed it.

0x4323334d79239ef30e3202f6b0dc4ae2cbf4c2.note: Delegate-and-drain sweeper. Observed across many victims.
0x4323334d79239ef30e3202f6b0dc4ae2cbf4c2.evidence: Confirmed via victim authorization list and drain tx 0x92f6b970b9742a936dd77c16cc095f7360d5485cdec444b00096366f08a6c4ad

0x717594f59b0ca8e81a201ef9c28daca608a093.note: Delegate-and-drain sweeper. Deployed by 0xE0a4C31e..., itself later swept.
0x717594f59b0ca8e81a201ef9c28daca608a093.evidence: Confirmed via victim authorization list and drain tx 0xda8dda9ee71cb084c027dbeb9efc6f65a9c2769b84017f64e9d6a1293fb89cab

0x89046d34e70a65acab2152c26a0c8e493b5ba6.note: Advanced CrimeEnjoyor 2 sweeper. Auto-sweeps all incoming ETH/BNB and tokens from compromised addresses.
0x89046d34e70a65acab2152c26a0c8e493b5ba6.evidence: Verified contract on Etherscan with official Wintermute report banner: 'used in sweeping funds from compromised wallets. Reported by Wintermute.'

0x6b7879a5d747e30a3adb37a9e41c046928fce9.note: CrimeEnjoyor sweeper (Delegator 7). Auto-sweeps incoming ETH/BNB from compromised addresses.
0x6b7879a5d747e30a3adb37a9e41c046928fce9.evidence: Verified contract on Etherscan with official Wintermute report banner: 'used in sweeping funds from compromised wallets. Reported by Wintermute.'
